supported_devices: 24V solenoid valves, 12/120VAC pumps, AMP-3 sensor board, WCS water content sensors, flow meters, water detectors
compatible_sensors: TrolMaster AMP-3 nutrient sensor board (pH, EC, water temp), WCS-1/WCS-2/WCS-3 water content sensors (up to 50), DFM-1 digital flow meter, WD-1 water detector (up to 50 combined sensors)
compatible_irrigation: 24V solenoid valves, 120VAC/12V pumps (base: up to 50 each; expandable to 300 pumps and 300 solenoids with additional expansion modules)
recommended_use_note: Advanced multi-zone irrigation controller for large commercial grows. Supports crop-steering via feed-on-demand, feed-by-volume, and calendar-based modes. Includes AMP-3 for pH, EC, and water temp monitoring. Expandable to 300 pumps and 300 solenoids. Wired Ethernet only.
uvp_notes: EU retailer price incl. VAT (€2,086.64 excl. VAT at 19%). Listed as 'on the way' (awaiting stock). No official manufacturer UVP published.
notes: SKU: NFS-2. 10" touchscreen. Input 100–240V. ETL/FCC certified. IP20 rated. Max 50 sensors and 50 pumps/solenoids directly; expandable to 300 pumps + 300 solenoids via expansion modules. Up to 50 individual irrigation schedules. Feed-on-demand via DFM-1 flow meter or WCS sensors. Feed-by-volume mode. Automatic reservoir refill capability. Multi-reservoir monitoring. Calendar-based multi-day grow recipes. Includes AMP-3 sensor board (pH, EC, water temp). Max connection distance 1000m. TM+ app and web-based remote control. Wired Ethernet only.
